generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the trade-offs? Our partners aren't pulling their weight - NATO allies only spend 1.5% of GDP on defense on average. Meanwhile, our own communities are struggling with basic services. Shouldn't we focus on fixing things at home first? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
